title: Workspaces / Accounts / Cost panels
description: Workspaces: grid of cards, status pill, sharedWith, last-used, click → edit. Accounts: UsageBar, R13 freshness chip, 5h+7d windows, tokenStatus pill. Cost: Sparkline week-to-date, breakdown by provider.

context.text: Implemented dashboard Workspaces, Accounts, and Cost panels with real collector state, redacted workspace edit PATCH, cache-only live account usage, and safe account/cost DTOs. Gates passed: npm test -- --runInBand (102 suites, 2446 passed, 5 skipped), npm run build, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run typecheck:dashboard, npm audit --audit-level=moderate, Swift build, git diff --check, and dashboard Playwright E2E (4 passed). Screenshot proof: ~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech/T-DASH-011-workspaces-accounts-cost-desktop.png, ~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech/T-DASH-011-workspace-edit-dialog.png, ~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech/T-DASH-011-workspaces-accounts-cost-mobile.png. Codex adversarial review found prior blockers; all were fixed, and final focused review reported no blocking findings.
